profile.name: Carter Lim
highlights: Built and shipped products quickly with measurable early traction
Implemented Stripe + Firebase payment and automation flows
Built data pipelines to Google Sheets
Strong blend of product execution + engineering
Built Campus Compass to help reduce student loneliness by improving club discovery

experiences.name: Campus Compass
experiences.problem: Roughly 50% of graduating seniors were classified as lonely in experiment context
experiences.what_built: Club discovery product to help students find communities
experiences.impact: Pilot expansion planned across additional CSU schools
